creator: decke@FreeBSD.org
text:
It looks almost the same as our development port for 4.0-4b:
http://svn.bluelife.at/index.cgi/blueports/browse/www/phpvirtualbox

I want to update www/phpvirtualbox together with the VirtualBox 4.0.x
update which will happen hopefully within a few weeks. Creating a new
port for a few weeks does not sound like a good idea to me. I'm aware
that phpvirtualbox can be used remote so we would have to keep a version
of it for every minor vbox release which is ridiculous given the
experimental status of the project.

-- 
Bernhard Froehlich
http://www.bluelife.at/
